It contains no dynamic code, no external input processing, no embedded secrets, or obfuscation. No issues are present.\n\n2. **Malware and Obfuscation:**  \n   The malware score of 0 across all reports is justified. No assumptions about vulnerabilities are made without basis.\n\n5. **Consistency of Scores:**  \n   The scores are consistent with the analysis.
